title: proofbundle trust-pack predicate v0.1
description: External/docs schema for the vendored trust-pack/v0.1 predicate (3.2.0 O2, EXPERIMENTAL). A TUF-inspired, signed root of trust: role -> {keyIds, threshold} for root/evalIssuers/decisionMakers/outcomeExecutors/timeAuthorities/witnesses, a keyId->publicKey map, a monotone version, an expiry, a previous-version digest binding, and an offline revocation list. The enforced validator is src/proofbundle/trust_pack.py (hand-rolled, fail-closed). Threshold-of-root signatures authenticate the pack. lowerCamelCase (ITE-9). No-Overclaim: the pack names which keys hold which role, not that those key holders are honest.

version.description: monotone version; verify rejects a version <= a supplied previous (rollback/freeze protection)

prevVersionDigest.description: content root of the previous trust pack (chain), or null for the first pack

publicKey.description: base64 raw public key: Ed25519 classical leg (32 bytes) when alg is 'ed25519' (default) or 'hybrid-ed25519-mldsa65'; ML-DSA-65 (1952 bytes, FIPS 204) when alg is 'mldsa65'

publicKeyPq.description: base64 raw ML-DSA-65 (FIPS 204) public key (1952 bytes) — the post-quantum leg; required when alg is 'hybrid-ed25519-mldsa65', not allowed otherwise

alg.description: crypto agility (ADR 0006): the signature algorithm this key holds; absent = 'ed25519' (backward compatible). A hybrid key requires BOTH the classical and the PQ leg to verify (no downgrade).

revoked.description: offline revocation: keyIds that must not count toward any threshold
